reasoning.evidence: No mention of BatchAction, DataReader, nablarch.fw.action.BatchAction, 都度起動, or 常駐型. The content does not reference Nablarchバッチ processing.
JSR 352 / jsr352_batch is explicitly mentioned only to EXCLUDE it: '本項で解説するアーキテクチャは、jsr352_batch には該当しない'. This is a negative reference, not an inclusion.
No mention of JAX-RS, @Produces, @Consumes, JaxRsMethodBinder, or REST API concepts.
No mention of HTTPメッセージング, HTTP受信, メッセージ同期応答, or HttpMessagingRequestParsingHandler.

These are clearly web application artifacts.
No mention of MOMメッセージング, MQ, キュー, 非同期メッセージ, or MomMessagingAction.
No mention of DB連携メッセージング, テーブルキュー, 電文, or DatabaseRecordReader.
